command: ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host command -v tar
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host command -v mysql
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host sudo doveadm user '*' >/dev/null 2>&1

tar -cf - -C /var/customers/webs/custgamma/ . | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host 'mkdir -p /data/customers/custgamma/var/customers/webs/custgamma/ && tar -xf - -C /data/customers/custgamma/var/customers/webs/custgamma/ && sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /data/customers/custgamma/var/customers/webs/custgamma/'

tar -cf - -C /data/customers/custgamma/secure-demo.test/ . | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host 'mkdir -p /data/customers/custgamma/secure-demo.test/ && tar -xf - -C /data/customers/custgamma/secure-demo.test/ && sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /data/customers/custgamma/secure-demo.test/'

tar -cf - -C /data/customers/custgamma/redirect-demo.test/ . | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host 'mkdir -p /data/customers/custgamma/redirect-demo.test/ && tar -xf - -C /data/customers/custgamma/redirect-demo.test/ && sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /data/customers/custgamma/redirect-demo.test/'
sudo doveadm backup -u alerts@secure-demo.test ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host 'sudo doveadm dsync-server -u alerts@secure-demo.test'
sudo doveadm backup -u ops@secure-demo.test ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host 'sudo doveadm dsync-server -u ops@secure-demo.test'
